title: Hieracium oioense
taxonomy: Hieracium oioense is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the aster family (Asteraceae). It is native to Japan and is a perennial herbaceous plant. The classification of Hieracium oioense places it within the genus Hieracium, a group of plants commonly known as hawkweeds. The species is further classified as a member of the subgenus Pilosella. This classification helps to distinguish Hieracium oioense from other similar species within the same genus.
uses: Hieracium oioense. Unfortunately, limited information is available on the medicinal uses of Hieracium oioense.
